title: The Stolen Ranch
writer: Robert F. Hill, George H. Plympton
actors: Fred Humes, Louise Lorraine, William Bailey
plot: Two friends return to America after serving in the Great War. Suffering from shell shock, Frank is helpless and Breezy has become his de facto caregiver. Strangers now run Frank's home, the Wilcox Ranch. Breezy goes to investigate.
